channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Green leaders warn party it must listen to Reform voters’ concerns to tackle inequality
item.description: Green leaders warn party it must listen to Reform voters’ concerns to tackle inequality

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham as prime minister would be beaten by Farage at general election, poll shows
item.description: Burnham as prime minister would be beaten by Farage at general election, poll shows

item.title: The Times: Tony Blair told Starmer to fight on, then attacked him for lacking a plan - The Times
item.description: Tony Blair told Starmer to fight on, then attacked him for lacking a plan - The Times

item.title: The Mirror: Andy Burnham vows to fight for 'every penny' over Mineworkers’ Pension Scheme scandal - The Mirror
item.description: Andy Burnham vows to fight for 'every penny' over Mineworkers’ Pension Scheme scandal - The Mirror

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham to spend £700k on helping migrants claim benefits - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham to spend £700k on helping migrants claim benefits - The Telegraph

item.title:
Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: This is very good on the logical preposterousness of the trans bathroom ban. It simply cannot have been the intention of the Equality Act or the governments which administered it.
www.liberalcurrents.com/the-end-of-t...
item.description:
This is very good on the logical preposterousness of the trans bathroom ban. It simply cannot have been the intention of the Equality Act or the governments which administered it.
www.liberalcurrents.com/the-end-of-t...

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: My post from this week on what an Andy Burnham government would look like.
The political team/cabinet. The policy platform. The first six months and the challenge of a very difficult budget.
samf.substack.com/p/what...
item.description:
My post from this week on what an Andy Burnham government would look like.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Is Andy Burnham Labour’s version of Boris Johnson?
item.description: Is Andy Burnham Labour’s version of Boris Johnson?
